div1.entryFree:
Savageness, 1) wild ferocity: wolves and bears, casting their s. aside, have done like offices of pity, Wint. II, 3, 187. she will sing the s. out of a bear, Oth. IV, 1, 200.
2) licentiousness, unruliness, proneness to excess: the flash and outbreak of a fiery mind, a s. in unreclaimed blood of general assault, Hml. II, 1, 34.
